title: Agent Board Project Config
description: Per-project configuration for Agent Board. Place this file at .agent-board/config.json in the workspace root. All VS Code settings can be overridden here.

github.description: GitHub integration settings for this project.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path to the JSON tasks file. Default: .agent-board/tasks

executable.description: Path to the Beads CLI executable.

defaultMode.description: Default Copilot mode when launching a task session.

localModel.description: Ollama model name for local Copilot mode.

worktree.description: Git worktree settings. When enabled, providers that support worktree will create an isolated worktree for each task.

enabled.description: Whether to create a git worktree for providers that support it. Default: true.

genAiProviders.description: Per-provider GenAI configuration. Global providers (chat, cloud, copilot-cli) can be overridden here. Project providers (ollama, mistral) are enabled and configured only here.

model.description: Model name to use with this provider.

endpoint.description: API endpoint URL for this provider.

columns.description: Ordered list of Kanban column identifiers.

pollInterval.description: Polling interval in milliseconds for providers that use polling.

logLevel.description: Log level for the Agent Board output channel.
